NYC’s biggest cross-domain fights are converging around affordability and governance: as Mamdani pushes faster affordable housing and weighs a rent freeze despite rising landlord earnings, the city also faces intensifying immigration disputes, budget and labor pressure, and urgent transit funding and infrastructure needs.

### Civics & Politics

- NYC faces a possible strike by 34,000 doormen and building workers, which could disrupt residential services citywide. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipAFBVV95cUxNVEc2dVVCLXU4U2FfYWc5cjhJYjJQbmZBdmNKU281RXVrNWpOdjJCY3doR2NGRm0yWnRzV0hXbzhqbzdoMVUtb3FmTU1UTXJHdnNZRjN6dXBXQndMWm5IMDhMak1PbzJtZ2pqMWRjYkFsX2V3TmwwM3VvamJETndiYVhJSnRDdlZEU0lESmh4eG1GRmk4N3hYTE90akdWOUdMLWtidg?oc=5)
- NYC’s rent board found landlord earnings rose as it weighs a possible rent freeze for stabilized apartments. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxOUVFrVkpoTFJIdWxteDlDMG9LV0VpM1VnVXFnR3RITDdvcFJTZE0wRHVsd0hzTTN4M200UV8zdHhNV2tmZkdET2t3Q2R3VzRqOFB3a2RzRHcwajZGZEQ1R1d4UWpMcDhhd1pHMUZGMmF2Z09lVm43LS1pSW9aS2ZPOVFIZDd3M3JpVTFkeXVNUWswckViUXYwb2tDNWwwUEkyYzVXQ19PbnNRbmc?oc=5)
- Mayor Mamdani moved to speed affordable housing approvals across NYC, potentially affecting development on Staten Island. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Elected officials are demanding removal of ICE agents from airports after reports of immigration enforcement there. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMidkFVX3lxTE1NTVBlWnNmTDI4ZFdaWXRDUmZfVkZiWmUxQlVKdGRacHFON2o0REFoYTd3elVVQkJUVXRkRWlTYXhOWXM1anpMS3BfMHZEcVJweDdEMHBEQXhHWTJfQmVuUXVKanRUQzNjeVFSRWtvSV9XM252eWc?oc=5)
- Court filings say ICE gave false information to justify taking migrants into custody in NYC. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Cooperation with ICE has become a key sticking point in a New York immigration bill. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipAFBVV95cUxQUjJwU1lHYUxHaE1KWTEzalRuaGtDcTVDWHlYdHB1bnQya1RJTFVTd1JqemVUa2hkUm9oLW9FUFF2NjNCNFMxM0RoTVl1Zlhsbk1GSnlHUmxQM19DMGQzclpOcExxbFRwY21udWJranVzamhmWnBkUFhXTTEtRW95dHlnNFVaVm5rLWFyR2lScFA0Nk4zc1lXVTNQS0ZzNkdRU0JpTA?oc=5)
- Transit agencies across New York say more state budget funding is crucial, with implications for regional service and fares. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipAFBVV95cUxPWHVDSVZDUWlJSHlDeE1Ud3BRMkNlSmN4RnZSNndic3J2Q0RydUN1ekRPSWZtMW9jTzZKa0NaNkRWTU9pVldTWU5EUFVKdUczZE5haS1qdGtTZFZwaWNPQTR5UGZETmdobzRLaWplQ2U4YmFMT05jSUV2NGFYNzZxcVVCWnY2Z3VrWWxPNFctQXR1RVFfSnNHMk5yR3lCaTIteHZ5NQ?oc=5)
- A court filing argues the NYPD is not legally required to protect individual New Yorkers. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirgFBVV95cUxPTmU1QkducnBHYzRUVDc4V3lZcl9SNGtBSzYzQm9xRV8yRFpCNXMxZ1VJLVpzbWVVNnA4OThiM0NjSU5ucEI0R3BXMDRPaS1ueFNJdFpQR3BWRWNaRGIyRE5xd1E5dmlFYURSRVVIMHFUQ2NhUTNyeUxuMXMzQ0xTSUxZcWxibWNTVGdWWmtXMnBKRlVaTVppTmNJNFgzOUJfX0ZqS1pSZDBNYUxxcVE?oc=5)
- A class-size plan is central to Mayor Mamdani’s push to extend mayoral control of NYC schools. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijwFBVV95cUxQaDFtaVdncnNxUjdLVjlCRFJ5dXdUZDJHZ212Yi0yYm5xWTJYWnpaRjJzNGJCeExmRm5YWVIzYUNoRUg0WGZSRzczOG1ONWpaVlpZZm9BdXZVMWpvbjFuV3hpLThUNW9zQjkyTG1rVkpaaXpTSG10MHNyQ2tKUWQzNHRuYWlFS19rVnZJYUxyMA?oc=5)
- Mayor Mamdani defended reversing course on rental assistance meant to help people move out of shelters. - NYC home health aides are pressing Mayor Mamdani to support ending 24-hour shifts. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMingFBVV95cUxNdEs0dmV0QWY4ZjhwWWt3cjRDRGNiNUZ4TGJJSTdrRTV3ZjZ0N1FDNWdTNmhLMXpLN0NnMmxXSW5wbkpVc0JaM05nMUxpYTROQkU5TW13V1FPVG0yUl9aY09sUmpxX09BSUdoRDVOemFpQXBXVmxHQV9mY25SeUljMmxiQnFmWm5FR0YxSVh3Wjg4ZHdiMjZ6bjRwQW5QZw?oc=5)
- The first massive boring machine for the new New York–New Jersey tunnel now has a projected start timeline. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)

### Opportunities & Welfare

- Ending soon: Bronx and Brooklyn housing lottery apartments are available from $940 monthly. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinAFBVV95cUxPbXJLRW1FUnlNd0E2X1d5TE5EMTh0OG1zMFllVTQ2ckMtZ0xUWlJvcEJ6XzFCYnhyN0VhcmVtMTFHLUdHRVR0bE91VDh2Ml9HR0dTOWlkdUhleEhScjNWel9FZ3pkdVlRb0hKYXNPQ3ZselI3WlhZcHFidVlJR3haTEVZZENJNHg4YncyMGJlRTVvY2dIT3UyNldiVDk?oc=5)

### Community

- Sardi’s will temporarily close after the Shubert Organization acquired the Theatre District landmark.
